glosses.ja: 登録する; 申し込む

sentences.target: Je m'inscris au club de tennis.

translations.fr: Je m'inscris au club de tennis.
translations.en: I'm signing up for the tennis club.
translations.es: Me inscribo en el club de tenis.
translations.de: Ich melde mich beim Tennisclub an.
translations.it: Mi iscrivo al club di tennis.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在报名参加网球俱乐部。
translations.yue: 我而家報名加入網球會。
translations.pt: Estou me inscrevendo no clube de tênis.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đăng ký vào câu lạc bộ quần vợt.
translations.nl: Ik schrijf me in bij de tennisclub.
translations.hi: मैं टेनिस क्लब में नाम लिखवा रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg melder meg inn i tennisklubben.
translations.ro: Mă înscriu la clubul de tenis.
translations.da: Jeg melder mig ind i tennisklubben.
translations.ja: テニスクラブに入会します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the verb.
Clitic reflexive/object pronoun (1sg), elided before a vowel; marks the pronominal use of the verb (s'inscrire), coreferential with the subject.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate in pronominal construction (s'inscrire = to sign up).
Contraction of the preposition à + definite article le; introduces a prepositional complement.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'au club de tennis'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying the type of club.
Common noun; complement of 'club' in the sequence 'club de tennis'.

translations.en: You have to sign up before Friday.
translations.es: Tienes que inscribirte antes del viernes.
translations.de: Du musst dich bis Freitag anmelden.
translations.zh-Hans: 你必须在周五之前报名。
translations.yue: 你要喺星期五之前報名。
translations.pt: Você precisa se inscrever antes de sexta-feira.
translations.he: אתה צריך להירשם לפני יום שישי.
translations.vi: Bạn phải đăng ký trước thứ Sáu.
translations.ar: يجب أن تسجل قبل يوم الجمعة.
translations.nl: Je moet je voor vrijdag inschrijven.
translations.hi: तुम्हें शुक्रवार से पहले पंजीकरण करना होगा.
translations.el: Πρέπει να εγγραφείς πριν από την Παρασκευή.
translations.nb: Du må melde deg på før fredag.
translations.id: Kamu harus mendaftar sebelum hari Jumat.
translations.sv: Du måste anmäla dig före fredag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să te înscrii înainte de vineri.
translations.da: Du skal tilmelde dig inden fredag.
translations.ja: 金曜日までに申し込まなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; modal verb expressing obligation, selecting an infinitival complement.
Clitic reflexive pronoun (2sg), elided before a vowel; part of the pronominal infinitive (t'inscrire).
Infinitive; complement of 'dois' in a modal construction; with the clitic forms the pronominal verb (s'inscrire).
Preposition marking a temporal limit; introduces a time-noun complement.
Common noun denoting a day of the week; object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: On inscrit notre fils à la crèche.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɛ̃skʁi notʁə fis a la kʁɛʃ/

translations.fr: On inscrit notre fils à la crèche.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɛ̃skʁi notʁə fis a la kʁɛʃ/
translations.en: We're enrolling our son at daycare.
translations.es: Estamos inscribiendo a nuestro hijo en la guardería.
translations.de: Wir melden unseren Sohn in der Kita an.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在给儿子报名托儿所。
translations.yue: 我哋幫個仔報名入托兒所。
translations.ru: Мы записываем нашего сына в детский сад.
translations.pt: Estamos matriculando nosso filho na creche.
translations.he: אנחנו רושמים את הבן שלנו למעון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đăng ký cho con trai chúng tôi vào nhà trẻ.
translations.nl: We schrijven onze zoon in bij het kinderdagverblijf.
translations.uk: Ми записуємо нашого сина до дитячого садка.
translations.hi: हम अपने बेटे का डेकेयर में दाखिला करा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Εγγράφουμε τον γιο μας στον παιδικό σταθμό.
translations.nb: Vi melder sønnen vår inn i barnehagen.
translations.id: Kami mendaftarkan putra kami ke penitipan anak.
translations.sv: Vi anmäler vår son till förskolan.
translations.ro: Îl înscriem pe fiul nostru la creșă.
translations.da: Vi skriver vores søn ind i vuggestuen.
translations.ja: 息子を保育園に申し込みます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun, often used colloquially for 'we'; grammatical subject.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive main verb agreeing with 'on'.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), attributive; modifies 'fils'.
Common noun; direct object of 'inscrit'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement denoting goal/destination.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'crèche'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Vous inscrivez les enfants au cours.

translations.fr: Vous inscrivez les enfants au cours.
translations.en: You are registering the children for the class.
translations.es: Están inscribiendo a los niños en el curso.
translations.de: Ihr meldet die Kinder für den Kurs an.
translations.it: State iscrivendo i bambini al corso.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们正在为孩子报名上课。
translations.yue: 你哋而家幫啲小朋友報名上堂。
translations.pt: Vocês estão inscrevendo as crianças no curso.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang đăng ký cho bọn trẻ vào lớp học.
translations.nl: Jullie schrijven de kinderen in voor de cursus.
translations.hu: Ti regisztráljátok a gyerekeket a tanfolyamra.
translations.hi: आप बच्चों को कक्षा के लिए पंजीकृत कर रहे हैं.
translations.ro: Îi înscrieți pe copii la curs.
translations.ja: 子どもたちをクラスに申し込んでいます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural (or polite singular) subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Present indicative, 2nd person plural; main transitive verb.
Definite article, plural; determines 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'inscrivez'.
Contraction of à + le; introduces the prepositional complement 'au cours'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au'.
